result.finding: No Dockerfile, Containerfile, or docker-compose files found. The project includes spring-boot-docker-compose and spring-boot-testcontainers as test-scoped dependencies, indicating Docker is used indirectly for local development and testing but no production container configuration exists.

values: Docker (test/dev only via spring-boot-docker-compose and Testcontainers)
